message:
feat(runtime): add BatchScope for coalesced Observable notifications (bd-2my1.4)

Implement batch update coalescing with RAII BatchScope guard, thread-local
deferred notification queue, nested batch support, and panic-safe flush.
Observable::notify() now checks batch context before firing callbacks.
10 unit tests covering deferral, nesting, immediate values, and multi-observable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
